series_metadata.series_description: This form and all associated documentation, is submitted to us by neighboring state departments of revenue and/or taxation who have wholesale dealers domiciled in their states that have a valid Ohio wholesalers license and are authorized to ship cigarettes into Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 3 yrs end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: 3 yrs end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
